status: Fixed in current working tree; needs governed closeout
finding: A file-scoped task claim registered as `parallel-safe`, but effective arbitration reinterpreted the same active intent as malformed because it required non-empty `atomRefs` even though the registry contract permits task-level file-only writes.
expectedBehavior: Register and effective arbitration must accept the same valid intent shape; file-scoped task claims with non-empty target files must not self-block solely because atom refs are absent.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-AAO-0157 self intent was `parallel-safe` at registration but `blocked-active-lease` at effective status. Releasing and reclaiming reproduced it. Source fix permits file-only intents while retaining fail-closed empty target-file rejection; focused conflict-matrix regression and frozen runner status pass.
followUp: Commit the Broker parity repair with release artifacts and retain self-intent effective-status regression coverage.
